DeliveryMode.description:
Derived routing decision computed by the merge phase from
`consensus_breaking` + `poc_implementable`. Drives Phase 5 publishing.

oneOf.description: Performance fix — full bench, normal PR.

Deliberate consensus change shipped as a PoC PR (scoped tests, no
benchmark, draft PR with safety labels).
Consensus change too large for PoC mode — issue-only.

First time `sbagent maintain` observes a PR as open. Publish
creates the PR; maintain records the first observation.
PR merged into its base branch.
PR stayed open past the configured stale threshold.
PR head sha changed after a prior observation.
PR is open but its head ref no longer exists.

First time `sbagent maintain` observes an issue as open.
Publish creates the issue; maintain records the first
observation.

OptimizerMemoryAttempt.description: One archived attempt enriched with the latest known lifecycle state.

delivery_mode.description: Delivery mode used by the archived target.

finished_at.description: Session finished timestamp. Used for deterministic newest-first order.

head_sha.description: Latest PR head SHA, when GitHub reported one.

issue_url.description: Issue URL, when the archived target opened an issue.

lifecycle_kind.description: Latest maintain event kind for the PR/issue URL, when known.

lifecycle_observed_at.description: Timestamp of the latest maintain observation, when known.

lifecycle_state.description: Latest normalized maintain state, when known.

pr_url.description: PR URL, when the archived target opened a PR.

reason_code.description: Optional reason code from the archived target row.

source_sha.description:
Source SHA recorded by the archived session. Missing means drift
unknown, not "same source."

OptimizerMemoryFamily.description: Memory relevant to one current-session family.

omitted_sibling_signatures.description: Number of same-family historical signatures omitted for compactness.

signatures.description: Prior signatures in this family, bounded by relevance/recency.

OptimizerMemorySignature.description: Memory for one historical fix signature.

attempts.description: Recent attempts for this exact signature, newest first.

fix_signature.description: Historical fix signature / archived target id.

omitted_attempts.description: Number of older attempts omitted for compactness.

TargetStatus.description:
Terminal status of a single target inside the session. Wider than
[`crate::models::summary::ExperimentStatus`] because the ledger
captures targets that never reached benchmarking (i.e. they got
aborted at the optimizer or merge stage and never produced a
summary row).

oneOf.description:
Bench measured a real improvement (NormalPr) or the PoC PR
landed (ConsensusPocPr) or the issue routing marker was
produced (ConsensusIssue).

NormalPr: bench did not show improvement above the noise
floor. Not applicable to consensus modes.

Target was dropped before producing a publishable artifact
(e.g. `optimizer-report.json` declared `outcome: "aborted"`, or
the merge phase pruned it). [`TargetRecord::status_stage`]
names where.

Pipeline error stopped this target — distinct from aborted in
that the framework (not the agent) decided the target couldn't
proceed.

current_source_sha.description: Current session source SHA, when source materialization recorded one.

families.description: One compact row per current-session family.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this memory snapshot was generated.
